summary: Validated all Phase 8 BACKLOG.md items against Phases 9-28 codebase. All 11 code-level findings resolved. Running 3 operator actions: (1) terraform apply DONE, (2) seed runbooks BLOCKED on VM creation error, (3) ACR rebuild still uploading.

completed_tasks.name: Rewrite BACKLOG.md to reflect resolved vs pending items
completed_tasks.notes: All Phase 8 F-01 through F-11 + OTel audited. BACKLOG.md rewritten with RESOLVED and OPERATOR ACTIONS PENDING sections.

completed_tasks.name: terraform apply on prod
completed_tasks.notes: Applied successfully. 2 added, 7 changed, 2 destroyed. rbac_assignment_count=30. Activated F-01 RBAC, F-09/F-10/F-11 MCP connections, CORS, TEAMS_CHANNEL_ID wiring. Key Vault restored to Disabled after apply.

remaining_tasks.name: Seed runbooks (pgvector) via jumphost/VM
remaining_tasks.blocker: az vm create fails with 'ERROR: Extra data: line 1 column 4 (char 3)' on both snet-container-apps and snet-reserved-1 subnets. Jumphost VM exists in aml-rg (southeastasia region, not eastus2) — different region from prod VNet. Need to diagnose VM creation error or find alternative seeding path.
remaining_tasks.alternative: Use existing jumphost in aml-rg via az vm run-command if it can reach prod PostgreSQL (cross-region VNet peering?), or trigger seeding via GitHub Actions workflow that runs on the self-hosted runner (which IS in the VNet).

remaining_tasks.name: Rebuild ca-api-gateway-prod Container App (OTel spans)
remaining_tasks.notes: ACR build triggered (run ch6a failed — wrong build context. ch6b/correct run triggered with repo root as context, --no-wait, still uploading ~700KB tarball to ACR as of pause). Run ID will be visible in ACR portal or via 'az acr task logs --registry aapcrprodjgmjti'. After build completes, Container App revision will auto-update if revision-mode is 'Multiple', otherwise: az containerapp update --name ca-api-gateway-prod --resource-group rg-aap-prod --image aapcrprodjgmjti.azurecr.io/services/api-gateway:<tag>

blockers.description: az vm create fails with JSON parse error 'Extra data: line 1 column 4 (char 3)' on both subnets in rg-aap-prod
blockers.workaround: Use GitHub Actions workflow with self-hosted runner (runs inside VNet) to seed. Or use Azure Container Instances inside VNet. Or use az vm run-command on the existing jumphost if cross-region peering exists.

blockers.description: ACR build ch6b upload still in progress at pause time
blockers.workaround: Check ACR portal for latest run status. If failed, re-trigger: cd repo-root && az acr build --registry aapcrprodjgmjti --image services/api-gateway:<tag> --agent-pool aap-builder-prod --file services/api-gateway/Dockerfile .

human_actions_pending.action: Add GitHub Actions staging environment secrets: E2E_CLIENT_ID, E2E_CLIENT_SECRET, E2E_API_AUDIENCE
human_actions_pending.context: Workflow is wired but values not yet created in GitHub UI. See docs/ops/e2e-service-principal.md
Azure Bot Service is in Terraform. Package manifest, install in Teams channel, capture TEAMS_CHANNEL_ID. See scripts/ops/19-5-package-manifest.sh

decisions.decision: Used scripts/ops/terraform-local-apply.sh with SP credentials from credentials.tfvars
decisions.rationale: terraform init 403 due to storage firewall — script exports ARM_* env vars from credentials.tfvars and uses ARM_USE_AZUREAD=true. Had to also temporarily enable KV public access before apply and restore after.

decisions.decision: ACR build context must be repo root (.), not services/api-gateway/
decisions.rationale: Dockerfile uses COPY services/api-gateway/requirements.txt which requires repo root as context. Build ch6a failed with this exact error.

next_action: 1. Check ACR build status: az acr task logs --registry aapcrprodjgmjti (latest run). 2. If build succeeded, update Container App: az containerapp update --name ca-api-gateway-prod --resource-group rg-aap-prod --image <new-image>. 3. Fix runbook seeding: trigger via GitHub Actions runner (already in VNet) instead of temporary VM.
context_notes: All code-level backlog items are already fixed in the codebase (Phases 9-28). The only remaining work is operator actions. terraform apply succeeded and activated RBAC + MCP connections. Seed and OTel rebuild are the two remaining items. The VM creation error is blocking the seed — GitHub Actions runner approach is the clean alternative.
